# Spot It (Dobble) Card Generator

> Free web app to create custom Spot It (Dobble) printable card decks: choose a game mode, upload images, and download a PDF ready to print.

This site is a single-page tool for generating printable Dobble/Spot It–style decks. Users pick a game mode (quick to expert), upload one image per symbol, and download a PDF. No sign-up required; everything runs in the browser.

## Main

- [Spot It (Dobble) Card Generator](/) – Create and download your custom printable deck.
